name: Stay of Sale of Seized Property

eligibility.description: Applies to property seized under sections 6851, 6852, or 6861, provided the taxpayer files a timely Tax Court petition and the property is not perishable or excessively expensive to maintain.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Prevents the IRS from selling property seized under jeopardy assessments while a Tax Court petition is pending or before the deficiency notice period expires.
